problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Combining Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
